description: As a sustainability specialist, model a low-carbon concrete scenario in openLCA. Import the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip) and LCIA methods (~/LCA_Imports/lcia_methods.zip). Create a new process named 'Concrete, 30% fly ash mix' based on an existing concrete manufacturing process, modified to reduce Portland cement input by 30% and replace it with fly ash by mass. Generate a product system for this new process and calculate LCIA results using the TRACI 2.1 method. Export the impact assessment results to ~/LCA_Results/fly_ash_concrete_lcia.csv.
